an8.31:1.0.1: "Bhikkhus, there are these eight gifts.What eight? (1) Having insultedthe recipient, one gives a gift.(2) One gives a gift from fear. (3) One gives a gift,thinking: ‘He gave to me.’ (4) One gives a gift,thinking: ‘He will give to me.’ (5) One gives a gift,thinking: ‘Giving is good.’ (6) One gives a gift,thinking: ‘I cook; these people do not cook. It isn’t right that I who cook should not give to those who do not cook.’ (7) One gives a gift,thinking: ‘Because I have given this gift, I will gain a good reputation.’ (8) One gives a gift for the purpose of ornamenting the mind, equipping the mind."
